prompt: Design an infographic-style image of [OBJECT] that fuses a photorealistic render of the object with hand-drawn technical annotations layered directly on top. Render the annotations in black ink linework and matching text (architectural pen / technical manual look) sitting on a pure white studio backdrop. The annotations should include: • Labels for every key component • Exploded-view or cutaway outlines revealing internals • Dimensions, measurements, and scale indicators • Material callouts with quantities • Directional arrows showing function, force, or flow (airflow, sound, current, pressure) • Small schematic or cross-section diagrams where they help. Drop the title [OBJECT] inside a sketched annotation box tucked into one corner. Style and layout: • The realistic object stays fully visible underneath the annotation layer • Annotations read as sketched, precise, architectural • Tidy composition with deliberate negative space • Vibe: engineering manual meets museum exhibit. Visual style: Minimal technical illustration aesthetic, crisp black linework over photoreal imagery, exacting yet slightly hand-drawn. Color palette: Pure white background, strictly black lines and text. No other colors. Output: 1080x1080, razor-sharp, optimized for social feeds, no watermark.
